_comment: Starter corpus for one capability. 'target' is the capability directory name (capabilities carry no frontmatter 'name'). A capability competes against its sibling capabilities, so put sibling-capability prompts under 'negative' to test boundary precision, alongside fully out-of-scope prompts. Aim for 8-10 per side; 4 is the minimum.
positive: Decide between standalone and router architecture
negative: Bundle this skill into a zip
Validate my skill against the spec
Deploy the skill to Claude Code
Help me write a web scraper
